data.content: [Codex 2026-04-20] Implementation complete. Fix committed as d8c82704 on branch knot-98e6-shutdown-opencode. The OpenCode HTTP adapter now explicitly aborts any in-flight session and disposes the OpenCode server on interrupt/close, with process-group termination as fallback before readiness or if dispose fails. Verification completed in /tmp/foolery-98e6: bun run vitest src/lib/__tests__/opencode-interactive-session.test.ts, bun run vitest src/lib/__tests__/on-turn-ended-transports.test.ts, bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run build, and bun run test all passed.
